spec.doc: StarTrack Label Specifications - Modify Your Own System (MOS) v9

rules.title: AI 00 SSCC freight barcode decoded
rules.description: SSCC retailer labels carry a GS1 AI 00 SSCC barcode as the article identifier.

messages.pass: Valid AI 00 SSCC freight barcode(s) decoded.
messages.fail: SSCC assessment was selected, but no valid AI 00 SSCC freight barcode was decoded.

rules.title: SSCC check digit
rules.description: The final SSCC digit must satisfy the GS1 mod-10 check digit algorithm.

messages.pass: All decoded SSCC barcodes have valid mod-10 check digits.
messages.fail: One or more decoded SSCC values failed the mod-10 check digit.

rules.title: SSCC labels are despatch movements only
rules.description: SSCC barcodes may only be used for despatch movements, never for controlled returns or transfers.

messages.pass: QR movement type is N (despatch), as required for SSCC labels.
messages.fail: QR movement type is {actual}. SSCC barcodes may only be used for despatch movements.

rules.title: Product context comes from QR and routing data
rules.description: SSCC numbering cannot embed a StarTrack product or service, so product context is taken from the QR payload and routing barcode instead of the article identifier.

messages.pass: SSCC label: product is validated from QR/routing data, not the article identifier.
